level_signals: 5+ years of experience in product development, technical program management, or internal systems design
Expected to advise leaders and own multi-quarter roadmaps
Consultant and strategist role with domain expertise

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of experience in product development, technical program management, or internal systems design in an internal HR business function, including experience in global mobility technology, within high-growth or technology companies
AI and LLM fluency, including practical experience using LLM-based tools
Superior ability to understand and map out system-agnostic business requirements across complex, interconnected systems and support their translation to technology
Strong communication and collaboration skills, with experience partnering with a broad set of cross-functional stakeholders at all levels
Acute business acumen with a demonstrated ability to operate effectively in ambiguous, dynamic, high-velocity situations, and to manage and draw insights from data while navigating complexity

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree in business administration, human resources, technology or a related field.
Experience working in a software engineering team or organization.
Basic understanding of core internal systems (ex. HRIS, ATS, CRM, LMS, Ticketing, Finance systems).

scope.surface: Employee Experience technology design, implementation, and enhancement across Stripe's People Team
primary_metrics_inferred: On-time delivery of technology roadmap milestones
core_responsibilities: Partner with stakeholders to define multi-quarter technology roadmaps and articulate ROI
Act as a product leader by understanding employee experience needs and creating mockups to drive alignment
Conduct third-party vendor analyses and deliver build-or-buy recommendations
Collaborate with engineers, designers, systems analysts, and PMs to translate requirements into technical designs
Use data, storytelling, and KPIs to support prioritization decisions and monitor solution adoption
Apply structured project management practices to deliver solutions on time
Partner with PMO, Systems, Operations, and Communications teams to launch new solutions and facilitate approval processes

green_flags: Clear scope of responsibilities covering strategic and execution dimensions
Explicitly states preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement, encouraging broader applicants
Cross-functional visibility with senior stakeholders at Stripe
Stripe's stated mission and scale offer significant impact and growth potential
red_flags: Location and remote/hybrid/onsite policy not stated anywhere in the JD
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not mentioned
Requirement for 'global mobility technology' experience is a specific niche that may narrow the pool significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required and scope of responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from team description as internal platform/HR tech enablement)

ambiguities: The JD does not specify location, city, remote eligibility, or office time requirements. Location type left as 'unclear'.
